prestazioni: Engine: Colombo Tipo 168/62 V12 (3.0L, 280 HP stock) – Full balanced and blueprinted internals with forged Mahle pistons (9.2:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from GTO Engineering for 8,500 RPM reliability. Custom camshafts by Kent Cams (280° duration, 0.480" lift) with titanium retainers and dual valve springs from Ferrea Racing Components.

Induction: Dual Weber 46 DCF3 carburetors with velocity stacks and custom 3D-printed intake plenums by Velocity Motorsports, optimized for 12,000 CFM airflow. Cold air ram scoop integrated into the hood (aluminum fabrication by RML Group) with a carbon fiber air filter housing by K&N (custom part #E-1550).

Exhaust: Equal-length 4-into-1 stainless steel headers by Capristo (321-grade, 1.75" primary tubes) with a straight-pipe exhaust system featuring a 2.5" diameter titanium X-pipe by SuperSprint. Rear mufflers are bypassed with a remote-operated electric cutout by Borla (part #140605).
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber replica of the 1961 Le Mans-winning 250 GT SWB (chassis #2689GT) by BBi Autosport, including the iconic "Testa Rossa" front fender vents and rear ducktail spoiler. Paint: Rosso Corsa (Ferrari code #300) with hand-brushed gold leaf pinstriping by Paul Dalton (UK).

Wheels: Custom 15x7" and 15x8.5" Borrani wire wheels (replica part #5205) with knock-off spinners, wrapped in Pirelli P7 Corsa Classic tires (205/70 VR15 front, 225/70 VR15 rear). Center-lock adapters by ATS Racing for modern torque retention.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Paul Edwards Coachbuilding (UK), including the dashboard, door cards, and Recaro SRD bucket seats (custom Ferrari script embroidery). Steering wheel: Nardi 14" wood-rimmed wheel with a quick-release hub by NRG Innovations (part #500120-300).
